claims.quote: Leaders in Dermatology at Michigan Medicine are expanding a program that enables select residents to pursue a clinical experience abroad during the final year of training, with one resident having visited China late last year and three more expected to train abroad in the coming months.
claims.claimText: Michigan Medicine Dermatology expanding program for select residents to pursue clinical experience abroad in final year of training.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Mentions dermatology residency program with clinical experience abroad for residents — trainee/residency signal, Tier 2.
claims.limitations: Mentioned in a news article snippet, not a program page.

claims.quote: Accelerate your career. Advance world health.Careers at Michigan Medicine
claims.claimText: Page links to Michigan Medicine general careers portal.
claims.whyA1Missed: Generic site-footer careers link; A1 focused on article body about a medical student and the dermatology-resident abroad sidebar.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic careers portal link in footer — Tier 3 job-seeking signal.
